text:
OUTTAKES FROM EVANGELION (VOL.1) is an album composed by Shirō Sagisu. The album was published by King Records via its label KING with the catalog number KICA-3262, it was released on 30 July 2016. https://vgmdb.net/album/56940 . It is a collection of alternate, demo and unused tracks. The cover was illustrated by Mahiro Maeda.

Tracklist

Staff

Composed, Arranged and Produced: Shirō Sagisu
Orchestra Contractor: Lucy Whalley and Isobel Griffiths
Session Management: Philip Bagenal, Yukiko Tanimoto and Yuiko SAGISU (Ro-JAM)
Final engineering: Motohiro Tsuji (The Master)
Master: Patricia Sullivan at Bernie Grundman Mastering (Hollywood)
Artwork: Masashi Ichifuru (TGB design.)
Illustration: Mahiro Maeda
Artwork Coordinator: Takafumi Kitsuda (KING RECORDS), Saya Kaneshiro (KING RECORDS)
Director: Rie Shimasue
Executive Producer: Hideaki Anno
